item.title: #TrumpCancellation
item.description: Have a streaming subscription or membership to cancel? When they ask you the reason, it's this: Trump. New trend for subscription cancellation feedback on what reasons are you canceling is #TrumpCancellation Trump is purposely messing up the US economy. January 2024, Trump claimed the stock market gains were because of his expected management as future president. Trump on May 1st 2025 claims it is all Biden's fault: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/trump-says-bidens-economy-businesses-205516007.html Trump wants the middle class to suffer and be scrambling.
item.dc:creator: hellospacemonkey

item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: Funding came through!!!
item.description: I just want to scream with joy!!! I was supposed to work at NASA this year as a scientist, but the position was eliminated (you know why). I applied for funding of a climate science program, reached out to a bunch of companies (ironically including NASA), and they all said 'yes' to working with me!!! The program is fully funded! 60+ students are going to get an opportunity to work with big companies doing big things! In STEM! More next year!! Aaaaaahhhhh!!!!!!
item.dc:creator: TalleyZorah

item.title: Young Anakin Skywalker is getting better <3
item.description: Jake Lloyd says he's finally feeling 'pretty good' after an 18-month stint in rehab to manage his schizophrenia! He's still a huge Star Wars fan, just beat 'The Force Unleashed', and plans to binge some of the newer projects for Star Wars Day. (via: Clayton_Sandell)

item.title: AmeriCorps is Dead
item.description:
https://apnews.com/article/americorps-volunteers-fema-doge-05b1d1cd53e0b5b9f64c17eaba7adf95
I served AmeriCorps a few years back. This program had many sub programs specific to local areas and skill development. Mine was NOWCorps (Northern Ohio Watershed Corps) that focused on conservation in the watershed (educational and through action). We were paid $7 hourly, roughly a $540 stipend. We did it because we wanted the skills, not the pay. We did it for local communities (tree and garden plantings, trash cleaning up and habitat restoration), and local conservation education. We were a service to utilize. It really saddens me that this is done and it will stunt the future generations for these kinds of opportunities to participate in something meaningful. I just got this email. Idk how to feel about it. "Shits fucked but we are having our last potluck!" :(
item.dc:creator: Boppit92

item.title: No vaccines for you
item.description:
Vaccine soap box time. I keep telling myself I shouldn’t be surprised by what RFK Jr’s brainworm is up to and then he goes and pulls some new horrifying move. In today’s edition of “what fresh hell” RFK Jr is going to be requiring that all new vaccines, including updated versions of existing vaccines like COVID vaccines, be tested against placeboes.
I do this for a living. I do this for a goddamn living - manage vaccine research trials for brand new and updated vaccines for a whole host of infectious diseases, from flu to Zika, West Nile, and malaria, etc. Brand new vaccines, aka the OGs, are tested against placeboes. Because placebo vs actual vaccine is part of the statistical analysis and safety review that helps folks decide if it’s safe to continue additional phases of research/testing and for regulatory agencies determine if it’s safe to approve for use. Updated vaccines (like second generation COVID vaccines or any of the updated versions of the flu vaccine) are often tested using the currently approved vaccine as the control group instead of a placebo. Because we already have a vaccine that is a) approved, b) has a known side effect profile, and c) has years worth of its own research data to compare to when reviewing data for the updated vaccine. It is wildly unethical to use a saline placebo for studies of updated vaccines when there is an approved vaccine you can use as a control that you know will protect them against the infectious disease being studied. To force researchers to purposefully leave study participants unprotected is negligent and insane.
If RFK Jr wanted to gut vaccine research and increase vaccine hesitancy without having to deal with the fallout of cutting funding, this is a good way to do it. This man actively undermines healthcare professionals and researchers with every breath and is undoing the decades of hard work we have done to make sure that there are millions of data points to back up the safety and efficacy of vaccines. https://www.npr.org/sections/shots-health-news/2025/05/01/nx-s1-5383172/rfk-jr-placebo-vaccine-testing-studies Edit: To clarify, I am not Lauren Hughes, she just had an on point reaction to this.
item.dc:creator: tinyvalkyrie

item.title: What Happened Today #91
item.description: ?️?? They renamed a holiday, planned a loyalty parade, and put Dr. Phil on a national religious commission. And why does a country with separation of church and state enshrined create a state-run religion committee? This isn’t about patriotism. They're creating fake traditions. A parade here, a flag there, a sermon on TV--all of it part of the infrastructure for control. Truth is being replaced with spectacle. Memory is being rewritten with loyalty tests. But Justice Jackson has had enough and made a stunning rebuke of the Trump administration. Find the leaders like her and follow them. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/npr-pbs-defund 2. https://go.govbrief.today/waltz-rubio-positions 3. https://go.govbrief.today/waltz-signal-cabinet 4. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-petition-venezuelans 5. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-military-zone 6. https://go.govbrief.today/georgetown-scholar-trial 7. https://go.govbrief.today/head-start-cut 8. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-budget-cuts 9. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-merge-slash 10. https://go.govbrief.today/army-birthday-parade 11. https://go.govbrief.today/veterans-day-renamed 12. https://go.govbrief.today/oil-iran-china 13. https://go.govbrief.today/gm-tariffs-5billion 14. https://go.govbrief.today/library-cut-blocked 15. https://go.govbrief.today/religious-liberty-commission 16. https://go.govbrief.today/hhs-transgender-report 17. https://go.govbrief.today/house-calif-emissions 18. https://go.govbrief.today/college-accreditation-reforms 19. https://go.govbrief.today/rev-brown-smithsonian 20. https://go.govbrief.today/60-minutes-emmy 21. https://go.govbrief.today/jackson-condemns-trump
